title: RNA-Seq Data Analysis Using Bowtie, TopHat, and Cufflinks
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x9qfr5w
materials: Total RNA was extracted from cells using RNeasy® Mini Kit (Qiagen).

steps.title: Poly(A) RNA libraries were constructed using...
steps.instruction: Poly(A) RNA libraries were constructed using TruSeq® Stranded mRNA Library Prep Kit (Illumina).

steps.title: The libraries were sequenced at 100...
steps.instruction: The libraries were sequenced at 100 bp paired-ends on an Illumina HiSeq 2500 platform.

steps.title: Sequencing data in FASTQ format were...
steps.instruction: Sequencing data in FASTQ format were deposited in the DDBJ Sequence Read Archive.

steps.title: The quality of sequence data was...
steps.instruction: The quality of sequence data was evaluated by FastQC after the trimming process by fastx_toolkit.

steps.title: The human reference sequence file (hs37d5
steps.instruction: The human reference sequence file (hs37d5.fa) was downloaded from the 1000 genome ftp site (ftp://ftp.1000genomes.ebi.ac.uk/vol1/ftp/technical/reference/phase2_reference_assembly_sequence/), and the annotated general feature format (gff) file was downloaded from the Illumina iGenome ftp site (ftp:// igenome:G3nom3s4u@ussd-ftp.illumina.com/Homo_sapiens/NCBI/build37.2/).

steps.title: The human genome index was constructed with bowtie-build in Bowtie
steps.instruction: The human genome index was constructed with bowtie-build in Bowtie.

steps.title: The fastq files were aligned to...
steps.instruction: The fastq files were aligned to the reference genomic sequence by TopHat with default parameters. Bowtie2 and Samtools was used with the TopHat program.

steps.title: Estimation of transcript abundance was calculated,...
steps.instruction: Estimation of transcript abundance was calculated, and the count values were normalized to the upper quartile of the fragments per kilobase of transcript per million fragments mapped reads (FPKM) using Cufflinks (cuffdiff).

steps.title: Metascape was used for the gene set enrichment analysis
steps.instruction: Metascape was used for the gene set enrichment analysis. A gene list for metascape analysis was generated using the output from the cuffdiff program.

steps.title: Gene ontology annotations were extracted using...
steps.instruction: Gene ontology annotations were extracted using Ensembl Biomart and sorted by corresponding values (common logarithms of ([FPKM of RCC4-EV] + 1)/([FPKM of RCC4-VHL] + 1)) calculated from the same cuffdiff output file.

steps.title: The integer one was added to...
steps.instruction: The integer one was added to all FPKM values because we cannot calculate the logarithm of 0. The histogram was generated using TIBCO Spotfire Desktop.
